name: Lark CLI
summary: Use larksuite/cli (lark-cli) from NextClaw with guided install, Feishu/Lark app config, OAuth, readiness checks, and safe automation boundaries.

summaryI18n.en: Use larksuite/cli (lark-cli) from NextClaw with guided install, Feishu/Lark app config, OAuth, readiness checks, and safe automation boundaries.
summaryI18n.zh: 在 NextClaw 中使用 larksuite/cli（lark-cli）：覆盖安装、飞书/Lark 应用配置、OAuth、就绪检查与安全自动化边界。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to drive Lark or Feishu Open Platform capabilities through the local lark-cli. The skill covers installing @larksuite/cli, config init, auth login and auth status, command discovery, dry-run and scope hygiene, and upstream-aligned risk disclosure instead of assuming the tenant and tokens are already ready.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to drive Lark or Feishu Open Platform capabilities through the local lark-cli. The skill covers installing @larksuite/cli, config init, auth login and auth status, command discovery, dry-run and scope hygiene, and upstream-aligned risk disclosure instead of assuming the tenant and tokens are already ready.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过本地 lark-cli 操作飞书/Lark 开放平台能力时使用此技能。内容包含安装 @larksuite/cli、config init、auth login 与 auth status、命令发现、dry-run 与权限范围收敛，以及按上游说明披露风险，而不是默认租户与令牌已就绪。

author: NextClaw
